title: Gravel Processor
body:
#  🖨️ About 🖨️

The Gravel Processor! This machine will turn all the gravel you get from tireless buidling into useful materials. This datapack also aims to fix annoyingly having to go into the caves to get small amounts of materials such as 1 or two iron ingots

Keep in mind you can only process one gravel at a time so throwing stacks at it will not process the entire stack, but staying close and holding Q on a stack works


<details>
<summary>📦Commands📦</summary>

**GIVE FUNCTION:**

/function process:give
</details>
